Featured Services

Cleaner Home. Better Curb Appeal.

Pressure washing is one piece of the puzzle — we're a full-service landscape company. These are our top three exterior cleans. Full menu of landscape services below.

Soft Wash · Plant Safe

House Siding Soft Wash

Low-pressure, plant-safe soft wash that lifts algae, mildew, and dust off vinyl, brick, stucco, and Hardie. Looks new again — no streaks, no damage.

Get a Price →
Concrete · Pavers

Driveways & Sidewalks

Surface-cleaner pressure washing on concrete, pavers, and stamped finishes. Tire marks, oil spots, and ground-in grime — gone in one pass.

Get a Price →
Wood · Stone

Patios, Decks & Fences

Brick patios, wood decks, stone walls, and fence panels — restored to their natural color with pressure dialed to the material.

Get a Price →

Right Now in Maryland

What Your Yard Needs This Season.

We see hundreds of properties a year — these are the services that actually move the needle in each season. Tap a tab to see what's worth booking.

🌸
March · April · May
Spring Reset
🍂
Spring Mulch Refresh
Lock in moisture, suppress weeds, and reset curb appeal before the growing season takes off.
🧹
Bed Cleanup & Edging
Pull winter debris, redefine bed lines, prep soil for new plantings. The single highest-impact spring service.
💧
Whole-House Soft Wash
Winter algae & pollen stains lift right off. Knock out siding, walkways, and the front porch in one visit.
🪜
Gutter Cleanout
Spring storms = clogged gutters = water damage. Quick service, big protection.

Plan ahead. Spring schedules fill quickly — call to discuss what your yard needs this season.

Lock In Spring
☀️
June · July · August
Summer Upkeep
🌾
Weekly Grass Cutting
Lock in a slot for the season. Crisp lines, clean edges, no missed weeks during peak growth.
🌱
Weed Pull & Bed Maintenance
Summer rain + heat = weed explosion. We pull, treat, and re-mulch as needed.
🌳
Hedge & Shrub Trim
Mid-summer shape-up keeps everything looking architectural, not jungly.
🪑
Patio & Deck Wash
You'll actually use the patio this summer — make it worth sitting on.

Heat-wave tip: we soft-wash in the early morning when surfaces are cool, so soap stays effective and plants don't get stressed.

Plan My Summer
🍁
September · October · November
Fall Prep
🍃
Leaf Cleanup & Haul
Wet leaves smother grass and clog drains. We blow, bag, and haul off-site.
🪜
Fall Gutter Clean
The single most important service of the year. Clogged gutters in winter = ice dams + roof damage.
✂️
Final Mow + Edge
Last cut of the season, slightly shorter, with crisp bed lines so it looks tidy all winter.
🛡️
Fence & Deck Wash
Wash off summer grime before winter sets it in. Optional sealer add-on for wood.

Beat the freeze. Fall services are best handled before the first hard frost — give us a call to schedule.

Book Fall Prep
❄️
December · January · February
Winter Planning
✏️
Free Design Consult
Use the off-season to plan next year's landscape — new beds, walkway redesign, or full property refresh.
🌲
Dormant Pruning
Trees and shrubs heal faster when pruned dormant. Cleaner cuts, stronger spring growth.
🪜
Post-Storm Gutter Check
After heavy snow or ice, we'll check for sagging, ice dams, or damage and clear what we find.
💡
Holiday Light Install
We hang, time, and take down. You enjoy the lights — no ladders required.

Plan ahead. Winter is the perfect time to plan out next year's landscape — call us for a free design consult.

The Process

From Dingy To
Paradise.

01

Send a Photo

Text a couple of pictures or your address. Most quotes back within an hour — no walkthrough needed.

02

Lock the Price

Flat quote up front. Townhomes are $200 middle / $250 end. No upsells, no surprise fees on the day of.

03

Pick a Day

Most washes scheduled within the week. We work weather windows so equipment, soaps, and timing are right.

04

Paradise Mode

We rinse landscape beds, protect plants, and sweep up. You come home to a yard that looks brand new.

Why Blue Palms

Pro Tools. Plant-Safe Soap.

We treat every property like the camera is rolling. Soft wash where you need it, surface cleaner where you don't, and a clean rinse on every bed and walkway when we leave.

01

Fast & Reliable

Quotes within the hour, washes booked the same week. We show up when we say we will, with the right rig for the surface.

02

Professional Equipment

Commercial-grade hot-water rigs, surface cleaners, and dosed soft-wash chemistry — not a hardware-store wand.

03

No-Damage Soft Wash

Plant-safe biodegradable soaps and dialed-in pressure. We rinse beds, protect plants, and never blast paint.

Properties We Wash

Built for Townhomes
& HOAs.

From a single end unit to a full row of townhomes, an HOA common area, or a custom home — we scale the rig to the job. Send the address, get the price.
